name: Foundation + architecture validated

verified_evidence.contracts_executable: packages/contracts C1-C10 with invariants (corroboration bound-to-fired-signals, dual-control, command authz, playbook_ref, bounded pagination)
verified_evidence.audit_substrate_live: append + full-chain verify pass; DB-level WORM trigger rejects UPDATE/DELETE/TRUNCATE (store.test.ts)
verified_evidence.audit_tamper_detection: hash-chain detects content-mutation, forgery-without-key, deletion, reorder (hash-chain.test.ts)
verified_evidence.architecture_review: two fresh-context reviewers (contract-fidelity + invariant-realization) returned CONCERNS; 3 issues fixed before fan-out (C2 self-reported count, effectiveAutonomy half-of-ADR-005, hook Bash/subdir gaps), 4 prod-hardening items flagged for Phase 7/12
verified_evidence.enforcement_floor: hooks written + unit-verified (safety blocks CROWN_HOOK_PROBE; verification-integrity blocks worktree/worker oracle writes incl. Bash, allows main thread). NOT ACTIVE mid-session — requires relaunch.

blocker_to_clear_before_phase_1: Relaunch the session so settings.json hooks activate; probe `echo CROWN_HOOK_PROBE` must be BLOCKED before fan-out.
